creator: carlavilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maybe we should create a redirect here and make an automatic link to docs.freebsd.org instead of having a paragraph here.

There's also a duplicated list of books and articles in https://www.freebsd.org/docs/books/

I don't know if this still makes sense.

I'm gonna send an email to Doceng to discuss this.

Thanks for pointing this out :)
